statement:
Three tasks must be completed by one worker. Each task takes the listed duration and has a deadline (latest completion time).

- Task A: 2 hours, deadline at hour 5
- Task B: 1 hour, deadline at hour 3
- Task C: 3 hours, deadline at hour 8

The worker starts at hour 0 and can only do one task at a time with no breaks needed between tasks.

Give a valid schedule (start time for each task) that meets all deadlines. If no valid schedule exists, say so.
constraints: Each task must complete by its deadline
correctAnswer: task b: start 0 end 1, task a: start 1 end 3, task c: start 3 end 6. all deadlines met.
acceptableVariants: task a: start 2 end 4, task b: start 0 end 1, task c: start 4 end 7
